name: Michalis Vourtzoumis
bio: Software engineer with a background in full-stack development, MLOps, and EU-funded R&D. Focused on clean interfaces and systems that are easy to use from day one.

name: Krikor Tzevahirian
bio: Specialist in backend systems, cloud infrastructure, and security. Responsible for platform stability, IAM integration, and making sure everything runs reliably in production.
